title: Harvard professor known for controversial alien theories to lead White House UFO council
description: Avi Loeb, a Harvard astronomer who has made headlines with his theories about alien encounters, will lead a White House scientific advisory council on UFOs.

title: Polarizing Israeli-born Harvard astronomer picked to lead White House UFO council
description: Avi Loeb vows to brief public and create website to share findings of team tasked with investigating origins of mysterious orbs and other objects reported by military personnel The post Polarizing Israeli-born Harvard astronomer picked to lead White House UFO council appeared first on The Times of Israel .

title: NASA astronaut drops chilling UFO hint ahead of ISS mission: ‘I’ll tell you if I find them’
description: A NASA astronaut’s upcoming ISS mission isn’t just about survival in space, it may quietly probe one of humanity’s oldest and most unsettling questions. Are we alone?

title: Pick to Lead White House UFO Council Is a Polarizing One
description: A polarizing Harvard astronomer known for splashy theories about alien visits has been tapped by the White House to lead a team of outside scientists to study the national security risks posed by UFOs, the AP reports.
